title: Resolution Approving and Adopting Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council MDRRMC) Resolution No. 20-09 Dated November 11, 2020, ?resolution Realigning Some Portions of the 5 % Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund Current Appropriations Amounting to One Million Six Hundred Seventeen Thousand Nineteen Pesos & 85/100 (P 1,617,019.85) for Various Purposes and Further Approving the Same?.
